body:
This just adds a quick mass conservation check in the deformation flow example, so that we can use it for QA/debugging in #889 and follow-up PRs where we will test different FCT types.

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Deformation flow: add tracer mass conservation checks
